spec.title: Service Endpoint Latency
spec.description: Average service response time over the last 5 minutes.

spec.title: CPU Usage %
spec.description: Current CPU utilization percentage of the service.

spec.title: Pizzas Sold per Minute
spec.description: Number of pizzas created per minute across the service.

spec.title: Pizza Creation Failures
spec.description: Estimates failed pizza creation attempts per minute by subtracting successful pizza creations from POST creation requests.

spec.title: Revenue per Minute
spec.description: Displays total revenue generated per minute based on successful pizza sales.

spec.title: Pizza Creation Latency
spec.description: Displays the most recent pizza creation latency.

spec.title: HTTP Request Logs
spec.description: Real time view of incoming API requests including method, route, status code, and response time. Useful for spotting slow endpoints and failed requests.

spec.title: Authentication Attempts per Minute
spec.description: Shows authentication attempt rates per second, split into successful and failed attempts using Prometheus rate metrics.

spec.title: Memory Usage %
spec.description: Displays average memory usage percentage across the service instances.

spec.title: Database Logs
spec.description: Shows executed SQL queries with duration and row counts. Helps identify slow queries and understand database activity.

spec.title: Unhandled Exception Logs
spec.description: Displays server side exceptions with route and error message. Use this to quickly identify and debug application failures.

spec.title: Factory Service Logs
spec.description: Tracks requests to the factory service with status and duration. Useful for monitoring external service performance and reliability.

spec.title: Active Users
spec.description: Current number of active users interacting with the system.

spec.title: HTTP Request Rate
spec.description: Shows the total HTTP request rate (requests/sec) across all endpoints using a Prometheus rate function.

spec.title: HTTP Requests by Method
spec.description: Breaks down HTTP request rate by method (GET, POST, PUT, DELETE) to show how different request types contribute to overall traffic.

spec.name: component
spec.label: Component
spec.description: constant template variable for the log component
